input.title: Free Electricity Policy
input.policyText: Provide up to 200 units of free electricity per household for low-income families with smart-meter targeting.

recommendedActions: Run refreshed simulation with live assumptions.

input.title: Fuel Price Increase
input.policyText: Increase fuel prices to reduce fiscal pressure and redirect funds to infrastructure and public transport.

recommendedActions: Run refreshed simulation with live assumptions.

input.title: Job Guarantee Scheme
